title: Specklinia sparsiflora
taxonomy: Specklinia sparsiflora is a species of orchid in the genus Specklinia. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Within this family, Specklinia sparsiflora is classified in the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Maxillarieae. The species is further divided into subgenera and sections based on its morphology and reproductive characteristics. Specklinia sparsiflora's classification is an ongoing area of research, and further studies may lead to revisions in its taxonomic placement.
